b:T57c8,<div class="specification">
<p>The image shows the chromosomes from a body cell of an adult human.</p>

</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Identify, with a reason, the sex of this individual.</p>

<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">

<p>Name of condition:</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
